title: GTMoreOreProcessing
description: Additions and tweaks of some of GTCEu's ore processing.
body:
### This mod adds and tweaks of some of GTCEu's ore processing.
This mod currently adds the following content:
* Two types of primitive multiblock machine
* Tweaks some manual processing
__Primitive Multiblock__
* **Bornze Plated Blast Furnace**
   _I wish I could make Primitive Blast Furnace with bronze, like 5u..._ 
   A Primitive Blast Furnace made with bronze, almost identical to GT5u.
* **Bronze Reinforced Blast Furnace**
   _Can't steel smelting be a bit faster?_ 
   The Primitive Blast Furnace has been upgraded with bronze, making it 25% more efficient than the regular PBF. It also uses the same recipe as in GT5u.
__Multiblock__ * **Ore Processing Factory** (1.0.3+)    _Ore processing, a hassle..._    The Ore Processing Factory does **All** ore-processing in a single step. #### __Manual processing tweaks__
* **Hard cauldron cleaning** (Configurable, default: true)
   _Don't you think it's strange that you can clean to 1 stack (64 items) with just 1/3 of a bucket of water?_
   No longer able to clean 1 stack (64 items) with 1/3 bucket of water, need 1/3 bucket per item. 
* **Easy cauldron cleaning** (Configurable, default: false)
   _It's such a hassle to prepare a bucket and a cauldron just for cleaning..._
   Allow you to throw it into a water source and it will be ready to clean.

* **Easy cooling** (Configurable, default: false)
   _It seems like you could cool it down just by throwing it into water..._
   Allow you to throw it into a water source to cool the Hot Ingot. However, you may be damaged aand you might not get it back in ingot form...
